nasb.text: Hear this, O elders, And listen, all inhabitants of the land. Has anything like this happened in your days Or in your fathers’ days?

esv.text: Hear this, you elders; give ear, all inhabitants of the land! Has such a thing happened in your days, or in the days of your fathers?

cnv.text: 老年人哪！你們要聽這話。 這地所有的居民啊！你們要留心聽。 在你們的日子， 或在你們祖先的日子， 曾有這樣的事嗎？

ccb.text: 长老们啊，请听我说！ 地上的所有居民啊，要留心听！ 在你们或你们祖先的时代可曾发生过这样的事？
